description: Rust program where http2_only() and serve_connection() only exist in a test file (tests/http2_test.rs). Production code in main.rs never calls the vulnerable functions. CVE-2023-26964 should be not_affected since the vulnerable functions are only used in dev/test code.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: http2_only() only appears in tests/http2_test.rs which is excluded from production builds. main.rs contains no vulnerable function calls.

findings.human_justification: http2_only() is only called in tests/http2_test.rs, a Rust test file excluded from production binaries. The production main.rs has no reference to the vulnerable functions.
